message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="blue">
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Form team agreements through consensus","description":"Day 0 activity: The full ensemble team meets for the first time. They need to establish team agreements (their "constitution") for how they will work together on this project. 

Constraints already given by the project owner (in CLAUDE.md):
- Mob/ensemble programming for all production code
- Strict TDD (Kent Beck style: Red-Green-Refactor)
- Consensus-based decision making (10 rounds before escalation)
- Tech stack: Rust nightly, Axum, HTMX, Askama, PostgreSQL/SQLx, TypeScript for progressive enhancement only
- Code quality: cargo clippy -D warnings, cargo fmt, all tests pass, tracing for logging

Within these constraints, the team should discuss and agree on:
1. Working agreements (communication norms, how they collaborate in the mob, role rotation, etc.)
2. Definition of Done
3. Code conventions and patterns
4. How they handle disagreements day-to-day
5. Any architectural principles or patterns they want to adopt
6. How/when they hold retrospectives
7. Whether they need any additional team members or SMEs

The team may also recruit additional members if they identify missing perspectives.

The agreements should be written to a TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md file in the project root once consensus is reached.","assignedBy":"kent-beck","timestamp":"2026-02-08T19:14:03.093Z"}
</teammate-message>

content.text:
I already have this task assigned and in progress. I've drafted the team agreements document and broadcast it to all teammates for review. I'm waiting for their feedback to iterate toward consensus.

Let me check if any teammates have responded yet.

Good, the task is in progress and assigned to me. I'm actively waiting for teammate feedback on the draft at `/home/jwilger/projects/todo_list/TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md`. As responses come in, I'll synthesize the feedback and update the document until we reach consensus.
